faceti-.def: 詼諧的人的人人物 (單數) (詼)

facetious/humorous.def: 詼諧的、愛開玩笑的、滑稽地的人的人物 (單數) (詼)

facia/fascia.def: 面板、(商)店名牌人物 (單數) (牌)

facial.def: 臉部地的人的人物、面部美容的人物人物 (單數) (臉)
facial.col: facial expression, facial hair, facial massage

facile/easy.def: 易做到的、膚淺的、靈活地的人的人物 (單數) (易/淺)
facile/easy.ex: It was a facile victory for him.

facilit-.def: 容易的人的人人物 (單數) (各)

facilitate/aid.def: 促進、使容易、幫助的人的人

facilitat-ion/facilitation.def: 促進、簡易化人物 (單數) (促)

facilitative/helpful.def: 促進的、有助於地的人的人物 (單數) (幫)

facilitator/facilitator.def: 促進者、主持人、服務商人物 (單數) (員)

facility/amenity.def: 設施、設備、熟練、天賦、便利人物 (單數) (施/巧)
facility/amenity.col: sports facilities, medical facility, facility for languages, with facility
facility/amenity.ex: He has a facility for languages.

facing.def: 面臨的、飾面的人物、襯裡人物 (單數) (面)

facsimile/fax.def: 摹寫、副本、傳真的人物、傳真的人的人人物 (單數) (本/傳)

fact-.def: 實事的人的人人物 (單數) (實)

fact/truth.def: 事實、真相、實情人物 (單數) (實)
fact/truth.col: as a matter of fact, in fact, hard facts, face the_facts
fact/truth.ex: In fact, I don't know him.

faction/group.def: 派別、內訌、紀實小說人物 (單數) (派)

factional/partisan.def: 派別的、小集團地的人的人物 (單數) (派)

factionalism/factional-.def: 派系之爭、派性人物 (單數) (爭)

factious/partisan.def: 黨派性的、好搞派系地的人的人物 (單數) (爭)

factitious/artificial.def: 人為的、不自然的、虛假的人的人物 (單數) (假)
factitious/artificial.ex: A factitious smile on her face.

factor.def: 因素、要素、代理人、(數)因子人物 (單數) (因/子)
factor.col: deciding factor, safety factor, factor in (計入), common factor
